title: Making it Polite
learningGoal: Transform casual expressions into polite requests and offers using 'I would like', 'Could you', and 'Would you like'.
instructions:
以下の3つのカジュアルな文を、丁寧な表現（Polite English）に書き直してください。(Change these three casual sentences into polite sentences.)
1. I want coffee.
2. Can you help me?
3. Do you want water?
ヒント：Would, Could などの助動詞を使い、必要に応じて please をつけましょう。
writingPrompt: Change these three casual sentences into polite sentences: 1. I want coffee. 2. Can you help me? 3. Do you want water?
promptGoal: To actively convert direct, casual statements/questions into formal, polite equivalents.

wordBank.transliteration: アイ ウッド ライク
ウッド ジュー ライク

referenceHints: 「I want」は「I would like」にすると丁寧になります。
「Can you」は「Could you」にすると丁寧になります。
「Do you want」は「Would you like」にすると丁寧になります。

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: 1. I would like coffee, please. 2. Could you help me, please? 3. Would you like some water?
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: 1. アイ ウッド ライク コーヒー、プリーズ。2. クジュー ヘルプ ミー、プリーズ？ 3. ウッド ジュー ライク サム ウォーター？
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: 1. コーヒーをいただけますか。 2. 手伝っていただけますか？ 3. お水はいかがですか？
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect transformation of all three sentences, including the appropriate use of 'please'.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: I would like some coffee. Could you please help me? Would you like water?
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: アイ ウッド ライク サム コーヒー。クジュー プリーズ ヘルプ ミー？ ウッド ジュー ライク ウォーター？
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: コーヒーをいただきたいです。手伝っていただけますでしょうか？お水はいかがですか？

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user change 'I want' to 'I would like'?
Did the user change 'Can you' to 'Could you' or 'Would you'?
Did the user change 'Do you want' to 'Would you like'?
Did the user include 'please' to soften the requests?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: 1. I would like coffee. 2. Could you help me, please? 3. Would you like water?

criteria.name: Politeness Conversion
criteria.description: Successfully substitutes casual modals with polite equivalents.

criteria.name: Syntax
criteria.description: Correct word order (e.g. Could you help, not You could help).

feedbackRules.onPass: Excellent! Your sentences are very polite and natural for a formal or business setting.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Remember the rules: 'want' becomes 'would like', 'can you' becomes 'could you', and 'do you want' becomes 'would you like'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try. Don't forget that when offering something to someone else, you should use 'Would you like'.

hintText: Make sure you have three separate sentences. Using 'please' at the end of requests is always a good idea!
